questionHtml:
Whilst swimming, Scarlett can hear the siren only if the sound intensity at her location is greater than 1.5×10-6 W m-2.

Find the values of d where Scarlett cannot hear the siren.
markschemeHtml:
1.5×10-6≥9d2               (M1)

Note: Award (M1) for a correct inequality.


d≥2450 m  2449.48…            A1


Note: Award A0 for d=2450.


[2 marks]

meta.title: Whilst swimming, Scarlett can hear the siren only if the sound intensity at her location is greater than 1.5×10-6 W m-2. Find the values of d where Scarlett cannot hear the siren.
